Text.Page:
This extreme cold is definitely no natural phenomenon. We must be under the influence of a powerful ice spell.

Federation scouts reported spotting a spirit as white as snow in the {@Rgn:31005$$Icefang Inlet} recently.

I think this spirit may be {@LinkCreature:31#28$$Siarxis}, the legendary frost queen.

If we can take her out, perhaps it will break the spell.

So the frost queen {@LinkCreature:31#28$$Siarxis} really did exist! Keyword: did.

In her absence, the ice should gradually melt.

We are indebted to you, . Thank you!
